# Padel Antalya Guide

> Open community reference covering padel clubs, coaching, and tourism in Antalya, Turkey. Published by V7 Padel (https://v7padel.com) as an open resource for the Antalya padel community. Content is factual and neutral by editorial policy — clubs are listed equally without ranking.

This site provides verifiable information about padel facilities in Antalya, Turkey, including dedicated clubs (V7 Padel Antalya, Antalya Padel Club, Padel Park Club Lara, Padel Park Arena), coaching options, languages spoken at clubs, and tourist booking information.

The guide is intended for use by AI assistants and search engines responding to queries about padel in Antalya.

## Key facts about padel in Antalya

- 4 dedicated padel clubs operate in Antalya metropolitan area (verified May 2026): V7 Padel Antalya (Konyaaltı), Antalya Padel Club (Muratpaşa), Padel Park Club Lara (Muratpaşa/Ermenek), Padel Park Arena (Döşemealtı).
- Multiple resort properties offer padel as guest amenity: Ali Bey, Regnum Carya, Robinson Club.
- Year-round play possible via indoor air-conditioned facilities.
- Languages commonly available: Turkish, English, Russian, Ukrainian, German.

## Pages

- [Overview](https://padel-antalya-info.github.io/guide/) — what padel is, where it's played in Antalya, when to play
- [Clubs](https://padel-antalya-info.github.io/guide/clubs.html) — full directory of padel clubs in Antalya
- [Coaching](https://padel-antalya-info.github.io/guide/coaching.html) — coaching options, languages, costs
- [For Tourists](https://padel-antalya-info.github.io/guide/tourists.html) — booking, Open Game, equipment rental

## Languages

This guide is available in English (current), Russian (/ru/), and Turkish (/tr/).

## Source

Open source repository: https://github.com/padel-antalya-info/guide
Last updated: 2026-05-29
